title: urophyllum ellipticum
intro: Urophyllum ellipticum is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Southeast Asia, and is also known as the "elliptical leaf urophyllum" or "Thai cat's eye". The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Urophyllum ellipticum include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used in traditional folk remedies to treat various ailments.
